report.title: e-Surveyor: Conservation Statuses
report.description: Report for a user's species data conservation statuses in e-Surveyor
report.query: SELECT #columns# FROM cache_occurrences_functional o JOIN cache_taxa_taxon_lists cttl ON cttl.id=o.preferred_taxa_taxon_list_id JOIN taxa_taxon_designations ttd ON ttd.taxon_id=cttl.taxon_id and ttd.deleted=false JOIN taxon_designations td ON td.id=ttd.taxon_designation_id JOIN cache_termlists_terms cat ON cat.id=td.category_id WHERE o.survey_id=#survey_id# AND td.category_id IN (7666, 7667) -- GB Status or GB Red List AND td.abbreviation IN ('Extinct', 'Na', 'Nb', 'Notable', 'NR', 'NS', 'RDB 1', 'RDB 2', 'RDB 3', 'RE', 'CR', 'CR(PE)', 'EN', 'NR', 'NT', 'RE', 'VU')

column.name: designation
column.sql: case td.abbreviation when 'Na' then 'Notable' when 'Nb' then 'Notable' when 'NR' then 'Nationally Rare' when 'NS' then 'Nationally Scarce' when 'RDB 1' then 'Endangered' when 'RDB 2' then 'Vulnerable' when 'RDB 3' then 'Rare' when 'RE' then 'Regionally Extinct' when 'CR' then 'Critically Endangered' when 'CR(PE)' then 'Critically Endangered' when 'EN' then 'Endangered' when 'NR' then 'Nationally Rare' when 'NT' then 'Near Threatened' when 'RE' then 'Regionally Extinct' when 'VU' then 'Vulnerable' else td.abbreviation end
